flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Truckee Meadows Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.9k → $3.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Truckee Meadows Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.6k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Truckee Meadows Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Truckee Meadows Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (26.2% → 32.1%).
